label: Prefab
description: Reusable map layout snippet composed of placed things, terrain patches, and nested sub-prefabs. Loaded and placed by map generators and scenario parts.

things.label: Things
things.description: Placed things. Each child element name is the ThingDef defName; the element body contains placement options.

prefabs.label: Sub-prefabs
prefabs.description: Nested sub-prefabs placed inside this prefab. Each child element name is the PrefabDef defName.

terrain.label: Terrain
terrain.description: Terrain patches. Each child element name is the TerrainDef defName; the element body specifies coverage rectangles.

size.label: Size
size.description: Bounding size of the prefab in map cells, serialized as '(width, height)'.

rotations.label: Rotations
rotations.description: Allowed placement rotations as comma-separated flags. Defaults to All if omitted.

edgeOnly.label: Edge only
edgeOnly.description: If true, the prefab is only placed at or near the map edge.
